details.reasoning: Excellent implementation meeting nearly all requirements. The shared package includes a comprehensive ThemeColors interface with all required color properties, three built-in themes (t3-dark, t3-light, t3-midnight) with proper definitions, and exported utility functions (getThemeById, isThemeId). The ThemeProvider component properly persists theme selection to localStorage and applies CSS custom properties. The useTheme hook is well-implemented with context support. ThemeSelector component includes excellent visual previews (ThemeSwatch and SystemSwatch). No build changes or new dependencies added. Minor issue: The rubric specifies 'getTheme and listThemes utility functions,' but the implementation provides getThemeById and BUILT_IN_THEMES constant instead. While this achieves the same functional goal and is arguably better API design, it deviates slightly from the specified interface. The constant-based approach is reasonable but doesn't match the function-based specification exactly.
